title: Surya Mantra
intro: Surya Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Lord Surya.
description:
Om Hraam Hreem Hraum Sah Suryaya Namaha॥
Om, salutations to the Sun God, who is the source of all energy and light.

faq.q1: When should Surya Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Surya Mantra is considered most auspicious when chanted at sunrise while facing the east.
faq.q2: How many times should Surya Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Surya Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting Surya Mantra is believed to bring confidence, positive energy, good health, and the blessings of Lord Surya.
faq.q4: Is Sunday an auspicious day to chant Surya Mantra?
faq.a4: Yes, chanting Surya Mantra on Sunday is considered especially auspicious.
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Surya Mantra with faith and devotion.
